description: Sonar is a prediction market app on Worldchain at `www.sonar.trading`. Separately, the `sonar.trading` host is associated with a public currency exchange-rate API described by the published OpenAPI specification.
summary: sonar.trading exposes one public HTTP API at `https://sonar.trading/api/v1/`, documented by an OpenAPI 2.0 spec; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surface was found.
